zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Carew II於1240年出生在英國波克夏姆爾斯福德時，他的父親William Carew26歲，母親Alice Marshall26歲。他於1263年與Dorothea Apulderfield在英國威爾斯布洛可爾卡維結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1297年在威爾士布洛可爾卡維享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Carew II于1240年出生在英国波克夏姆爾斯福德时，他的父亲William Carew26岁，母亲Alice Marshall26岁。他于1263年与Dorothea Apulderfield在英国威尔斯布洛可爾卡維结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1297年在威尔士布洛可爾卡維享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, James Patrick, Kieran.

Welsh (Pembrokeshire): habitational name from any of various minor places in Wales, in particular one near Pembroke with a major castle, named from Welsh caer ‘fort’ + rhiw ‘hill, slope’. The surname was taken to Ireland soon after the Norman invasion of England and was Gaelicized as de Carrún. In the 16th century a family called Carew from Devon played an important part in establishing the Tudor administration in Ireland.
Cornish (Somerset and Devon): from the cognate Cornish word kerrow (plural of ker ‘fort’), which occurs seven times as a placename in Cornwall.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Carew II was born in 1240, in Moulsford, Berkshire, England, his father, William Carew, was 26 and his mother, Alice Marshall, was 26. He married Dorothea Apulderfield in 1263, in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1297, in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Carew II est né en 1240, à Moulsford, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, William Carew, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice Marshall, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Dorothea Apulderfield en 1263, à Carew, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1297, à Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles, à l’âge de 57 ans.

Er hat 1263 in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom Dorothea Apulderfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1297 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

Lui sposato Dorothea Apulderfield nel 1263, nel Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1297, nel Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles, all'età di 57 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Carew II(이)가 1240년 영국 버크실르 모우스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Carew(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Marshall(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1263년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 카레에서 Dorothea Apulderfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1297년 웨일스 p브로케실르 카레에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Carew II родился в 1240 г. в местности моулсфорд, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Carew было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Marshall, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothea Apulderfield в 1263 г. в местности карю, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1297 г. в местности карю, пемброкешир, Уэльс в возрасте 57 лет.
